title: Snowy Spirits
description: The only Time and Weather Changer you will ever need!
body:
# Snowy Spirits! The only Time and Weather Changer you will ever need!
Allowing you to: - Change your client sided time (including moon phases!) - Change your client sided weather - Change your client sided Precipitation (SNOW!!) With the option to either do so Intrusively, increasing mod and resource pack support or non intrusively, only changing rendering while leaving weather data untouched.
Images Tall Birch Forest including Snowfall ![Tall Birch Forest including Snowfall](https://r2.e-z.host/3467c5f1-2f62-4f15-81ef-2b9be564d3df/4ntmrsov9ul6pw3.png)
Mod icon provided by [lucide](https://lucide.dev/).
